title: polemonium schmidtii
intro: Polemonium schmidtii, also known as Schmidt's Jacob's-ladder or Schmidt's Polemonium, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of western North America. It belongs to the family Polemoniaceae and is a member of the Polemonium genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and it has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Polemonium schmidtii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used in some skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
